Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MASAMI HATTORI'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER: 1. COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; 2. COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; 3. COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO; 4. COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE AND FOR PRODUCTION OF RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS; AND 5. FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Patrick Stokes of Hinshaw Draa Marsh Still & Hinshaw (408.861.6500 x6510) appearing via Court Cal for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff to comply with the court's order by July 29, 2011. Further, the court grants defendant's request for sanctions against plaintiff and her counsel, jointly and severally, in the amount of $1,592. Mr. Stokes to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
